publications.title: MAGHair: A Wearable System to Create Unique Tactile Feedback by Stimulating Only the Body Hair
publications.citation: Boldu, R., Wijewardena, M., Zhang, H. and Nanayakkara, S.C., 2020, October. MAGHair: A Wearable System to Create Unique Tactile Feedback by Stimulating Only the Body Hair.
